reviews.review_title: Couldn’t recommend the game any better.
reviews.review_description:
The game is awesome without a doubt. The style it captures is just a chefs kiss in the big slop pile of the Meta store.

The gameplay is a tad bit generic but overall is very fun with friends or just with randoms if you don’t mind that.

GET THE GAME!!
This VR game is amazing! It's a gtag horror fan game based off of ps1 graphics! It has multiple levels with monster...

Honestly, actually really cool.
The intro scene feels like smth straight out of an RPG title, and it’s freaking awesome.
The game itself has really cool (albeit sometimes disorienting) ps1 style graphics with a funky filter.
The monster’s designs are cool, though a tad boring (just my opinion though), and are pretty scary!
Not a lot of cosmetics, but certainly Intresting picks, and hey the currency works so that’s dope!
I personally give it a 5, really fun, pretty scary, and makes up for most graphic wise looking visually stunning.
Wonderful job, Army/Uriah, it’s awesome.
This game is so fun it’s ps1 styled and it’s fun and scary I got scared badly and I almost quit the game but the chase is fun download now
Such an upgrade from Monkephobia reanimated

developer_response.body: i get your point but this is monkephobia original we have bought the game from the original owner and he told us to continue it so just to let you know this is the real monkephobia

reviews.review_description: I love this game it is a blast and very scary with the ps1 graphics
